summary: I reviewed the input.json (no `composition` object was present, so no pinned steps constrain this project — I used judgment across the full library) along with the requirements and discovery notes for the dark-mode task. For **Build**, I included `Implementer` (required) plus `Test Critic` (required, any-phase) routed back to it, matching the pattern already used elsewhere in this pipeline. For **Review**, I included the two required steps (`Requirements Conformance Critic`, `Review Report Writer`) plus three conditional critics that are clearly warranted here: `Code Quality Critic` (substantial new code — Stimulus controller, possible model/migration/service, ~23 view edits), `Guide Alignment Critic` (the ui-style-guide and backend-guide impose explicit, non-obvious constraints — semantic tokens, restricted palette, service-based persistence — that this task is likely to brush up against), and `UI Test Critic` (this is a visually-driven, toggle/theme feature spanning the whole UI). All critics route their needs_work feedback back to `Implementer`, and `Review Report Writer` runs last to synthesize. The plan was written to `.pipeliner/phases/02-plan/main/workflow-composer/output/workflow_plan.json`.
